subcodes.first_line: Say: O people! This Day hath a melody, and its mysteries and virtues none but God hath fully reckoned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا قوم این یوم را نغمهاست و اسرارها فضایلش را جز حق احدی احصا ننموده و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transcendence; unknowability of God
